rooms.name: Thornwood Manor — Foyer
rooms.description: The grand entrance of Thornwood Manor. Dust motes drift through shafts of pale light. A grandfather clock ticks in the silence.

hotspots.label: Side Table
hotspots.description: An ornate side table. There's a half-finished letter addressed to someone named 'E.W.' The ink is still wet.

hotspots.label: Portrait
hotspots.description: A stern-looking woman in Victorian dress. A small plaque reads: 'Eleanor Thornwood, 1842-1899'. Her eyes seem to follow you.

hotspots.label: Study Door
hotspots.description: The door creaks open, revealing a dimly lit study beyond.

rooms.name: Thornwood Manor — Study
rooms.description: A wood-paneled study lined with bookshelves. Papers are scattered across a mahogany desk.

hotspots.label: Desk
hotspots.description: The desk is covered in financial records. Several entries are circled in red ink. Someone was tracking large withdrawals.

hotspots.label: Bookshelf
hotspots.description: Mostly legal texts and ledgers. One book — 'The Art of Deception' — is pulled slightly forward.

hotspots.label: Wall Safe
hotspots.description: The safe clicks open. Inside: a bundle of letters and a faded photograph.
